en_title: Bungie Announces Layoffs as It Admits 'Destiny 2 Fell Short of Expectations'
cn_title: Bungie宣布裁员，承认《命运2》未达预期
subtitle: 残酷重组
opus_summary: 索尼互动娱乐CEO Hermen Hulst宣布Bungie将大规模裁员，涉及《命运》和《失落星船：马拉松》团队。Bungie承认《命运2》未达预期，将缩减规模。此前《命运》系列已被搁置。

paragraphs.en: Bungie will lose a "significant number of employees" as part of brutal-sounding layoffs that will include "most of the Destiny team and some Marathon team members," PlayStation CEO Hermen Hulst has said.
paragraphs.cn: PlayStation CEO Hermen Hulst透露，Bungie将进行听起来相当残酷的裁员，失去「大量员工」，其中包括「大部分《命运》团队成员和部分《失落星船：马拉松》团队成员」。

paragraphs.en: In a public blog post , Hulst described the decision as "difficult" and "painful," but "necessary to align the studio’s resources with its current priorities and long-term goals." The news follows the recent ending of new content for Destiny 2 , and amid a lackluster player numbers for new launch Marathon .
paragraphs.cn: Hulst在一篇公开博客文章中形容这一决定「艰难」且「痛苦」，但「是必要的，以使工作室的资源与其当前优先事项和长期目标保持一致」。此消息公布之际，《命运2》刚刚结束了新内容更新，而新推出的《失落星船：马拉松》玩家数量也表现平平。

paragraphs.en: In its own statement , published via social media, Bungie confirmed its employees would suffer layoffs as the company was reorganized.
paragraphs.cn: Bungie在社交媒体上发布的一份声明中确认，随着公司重组，其员工将面临裁员。

paragraphs.en: Job losses at the studio had sadly been previously reported as likely following the shock news that Bungie was effectively putting the Destiny franchise on ice after more than a decade, with no further updates or expansions in the pipeline, and no imminent plan to make a full Destiny 3.
paragraphs.cn: 令人遗憾的是，此前已有报道称该工作室很可能裁员，因为Bungie在一项令人震惊的消息中宣布，将在运营超过十年后实际上将《命运》系列搁置，不再有后续更新或扩展计划，也没有近期制作完整《命运3》的打算。

paragraphs.en: Bungie's own statement on the job losses lies below in full:
paragraphs.cn: 以下是Bungie关于裁员的完整声明：

paragraphs.en: "With great sadness, we are announcing a reduction in force as we reorganize Bungie.
paragraphs.cn: 「怀着极大的悲伤，我们宣布在重组Bungie的过程中进行裁员。」

paragraphs.en: "As the leaders of Bungie, past and present, we recognize Destiny 2 fell short of expectations these past several years. Following our final content update to Destiny 2, and with our future projects still in early incubation, we unfortunately could not continue operating at our previous size.
paragraphs.cn: 作为Bungie的历代领导者，我们承认《命运2》在过去几年未能达到预期。在推出《命运2》最后的内容更新后，我们的未来项目还处于早期孵化阶段，遗憾地无法继续维持原有的工作室规模。

paragraphs.en: "We know this decision has a profound impact on the people affected, their families, friends, and teammates. While these changes are necessary to best position the studio now and for the future, that does not lessen the difficulty of this moment or the impact it has on those affected.
paragraphs.cn: 我们知道这一决定对受影响的员工及其家人、朋友和同事造成了深远影响。虽然这些变革对于工作室当前和未来的最佳发展是必要的，但这并不能减轻此刻的艰难，也不能减少它对受影响者的冲击。

paragraphs.en: "Later, we will share more about that future with you all but today is not that day.
paragraphs.cn: 之后我们会与大家分享更多关于未来的信息，但今天不是时候。

paragraphs.en: "Today, we wish to extend our gratitude and compassion to every member of the Bungie team who has been impacted and to those who remain.
paragraphs.cn: 今天，我们希望向每位受到影响的Bungie团队成员，以及继续留下来的同事，表达我们的感激与慰问。

paragraphs.en: "We hope you will do the same. - Bungie"
Earlier this month, a former Bungie staff member said that the only way to support the studio now was to support Marathon .
paragraphs.cn: 本月早些时候，一位前Bungie员工曾表示，现在支持该工作室的唯一方式就是支持《失落星船：马拉松》。

paragraphs.en: Tom Phillips is IGN's News Editor. You can reach Tom at tom_phillips@ign.com or find him on Bluesky
paragraphs.cn: Tom Phillips是IGN的新闻编辑，可通过tom_phillips@ign.com联系他，或在Bluesky上找到他。
